heading: Inconsistent laws repealed
label: 433f Inconsistent laws repealed
text: The provisions of the Act of (ch. 116, ), and Acts supplemental thereof and amendatory thereto and all other Acts inconsistent with the provisions of section 433a to 433f of this title are repealed to the extent of such inconsistency.March 3, 191940 Stat. 1322–1324
notes: References in TextThe act of , and Acts supplemental and amendatory thereto were not classified to the Code.Mar. 3, 1919
amendments: References in TextThe act of , and Acts supplemental and amendatory thereto were not classified to the Code.Mar. 3, 1919
